# ProAgentStore

> Marketplace for server-powered AI agents. Creators publish agent templates; users subscribe and run private instances with their own state, knowledge, memory, and caller-owned AI credentials.

Primary site: https://proagentstore.online/
API: https://api.proagentstore.online/
MCP: https://mcp.proagentstore.online/mcp
MCP docs: https://proagentstore.online/docs/mcp/
MCP discovery: https://proagentstore.online/.well-known/mcp-server.json
GitHub marketplace repo: https://github.com/ProAgentStore/platform

## Skills

- [ProAgentStore Skills](https://proagentstore.online/skills/): public skill catalog and install instructions.
- [proagentstore-mcp-operator](https://proagentstore.online/skills/proagentstore-mcp-operator/): operate ProAgentStore account state only through MCP.
- [skills.json](https://proagentstore.online/skills.json): machine-readable skill metadata.

## Install

Direct MCP for Codex:

```bash
codex mcp add proagentstore --url https://mcp.proagentstore.online/mcp
codex mcp list
# If the server shows "Not logged in":
codex mcp login proagentstore
```

Direct MCP for Claude Code:

```bash
claude mcp add --transport http proagentstore https://mcp.proagentstore.online/mcp
claude mcp list
```

Local stdio proxy:

```bash
npx @proagentstore/cli mcp
```

Codex:

```bash
codex plugin marketplace add ProAgentStore/platform
```

Claude Code:

```text
/plugin marketplace add ProAgentStore/platform
/plugin install proagentstore@proagentstore
/reload-plugins
```

## Correct MCP Runtime

Agents must use ProAgentStore account state only through the configured MCP server. Do not use the web UI or private REST/API routes unless the user explicitly overrides this rule.

MCP safety:

- OAuth scopes: `read`, `write`, `runtime`, `destructive`.
- Server-side read-only mode: `MCP_READ_ONLY=1`.
- Use `dry_run: true` on mutating tools before making uncertain changes.
- Repository overwrite tools require `confirm: "write_agent_file"` or `confirm: "batch_write_agent_files"`.
- Destructive tools require exact confirmation: `unregister_instance_runtime`, `cancel_instance_task`, `delete_instance_knowledge`, or `cancel_instance`.
- Use `mcp_audit_log` to inspect recent write, runtime, dry-run, denied, and destructive MCP events.

Use public trial chat only for discovery:

```text
list_agents -> chat_with_agent
```

Use private instance chat for real user work:

```text
list_agents -> subscribe_agent -> my_instances -> add_instance_knowledge -> chat_with_instance -> instance_messages
```

If `chat_with_instance` says it needs a Cloudflare Workers AI account ID and API token, the private runtime is working and correctly waiting for caller-owned AI credentials.

Browser-capable agents use PAGS as the control-plane brain and FAGS as the browser runtime/tool executor. Current CLI mode is `pags runner connect "$PAGS_INSTANCE_ID" --pags-token "$PAGS_TOKEN" --headless`, which starts the FAGS runtime and registers a Cloudflare Tunnel endpoint. Target cheapest best-practice mode is outbound FAGS polling to PAGS, with tunnel mode retained as fallback/debug.
